# Chat Shortcut Commands

- **`deploy`** — Runs the full deployment checklist in R: document → build manual → run vignette → render vignette → check
- **`commit`** — Outputs a formatted commit message in the chat (does not run git)
- **`wire <param>`** — Wires a new parameter through all required files (word_export → ternG → ternD → ternB → ternStyle → companion docs)
- **`issue <name>`** — Creates `development/issues/<name>.md` from the issue template
